prose:
Method–provenance block (all fields required for reproduction)
Property: atom-condensed electrophilic Fukui indices f⁺ (largest value reported) for pyridine, plus full f⁺/f⁻/dual tables (see JSON)
Level of theory: density-functional theory, B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting (exact four-center integrals)
Geometry provenance: user-supplied geometry file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz; single-point N, N±1 charge states at the same fixed geometry (fukui = ∂q/∂N Mulliken scheme)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, mult 1); cation doublet (charge +1, mult 2); anion doublet (charge −1, mult 2)
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine: PySCF 2.x) at verbose=4; live log written during the run to …/pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_02.out (path shown during execution)
Convergence & caveats: all three SCF calculations converged; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true. Warnings streamed by engine reproduced verbatim below.
